footer.tagline: Digital Trust in the Age of AI.

hero.tagline: Cyber resilience in the age of AI.
hero.subtitle: We combine security operations, compliance engineering, and AI governance for organizations operating across complex digital frontiers.

about.heading_l1: The ancient art of the Firewatch,
about.quote: "The word Brandvakt means 'Firewatch'. We ensure the fire burns smoothly, doesn't spread, contain it if something goes wrong, and ensure the safety of everyone."

capabilities.heading: Our Capabilities
capabilities.assessment_desc: Gap analysis and risk scoring against recognized frameworks — ISO 27001, NIST CSF, CIS Controls.
capabilities.network_desc: Monitor and harden networks transmitting protected data across distributed operations.
capabilities.vuln_desc: Continuous assessment, prioritized by risk exposure, with precise remediation guidance.
capabilities.identity_desc: Identities are the new perimeter. Protecting workforce access and consumer credentials.
capabilities.endpoint_desc: Advanced protection for employee devices against an evolving and adversarial threat surface.
capabilities.pentest_desc: Simulated ethical attacks to find vulnerabilities before adversaries can exploit them.
capabilities.awareness_desc: Training programs that address the human factor — your ultimate line of defence.
capabilities.grc_desc: Navigate SWIFT, PCI DSS, LGPD, and DORA with executable security and data frameworks.
capabilities.cloud_desc: Secure cloud perimeters across AWS, Azure, Google, or complex multi-tenant environments.

soc.desc: Continuous monitoring of endpoints, networks, and user activity for high-fidelity indicators of compromise — before damage is done.
soc.check2: Outsourced, managed, or collaborative SOC models

products.heading: Purpose-built platforms
products.desc_homodeus: Operational AI systems that replace manual workflows, automate decisions, and compound capability over time.
products.desc_academy: Recognized cybersecurity training programs built by active industry practitioners, for real-world application.
products.desc_bygrc: AI-powered GRC document intelligence. Centralized access to frameworks, controls, and compliance dashboards.

cta.heading_l2: on the right side of the fence.
cta.sub: Security-minded experts committed to your business continuity. We are the Firewatch.
cta.form_success: Thanks — your mail client should be opening. If it didn't, write to
cta.ph_message: Tell us about your security needs...
